message:
fix: bd doctor --check=validate re-checks after fix, reuses doctor infra (bd-e108)

- Fix bug: overallOK now reflects post-fix state (re-runs checks after fixing)
- Reuse applyFixList from doctor_fix.go instead of duplicate dispatch code
- Use bufio.NewReader for confirmation (consistent with doctor applyFixes)
- Add t.Cleanup to test helper for DB handle cleanup
- Remove dead code default case in fix switch
- Add TestValidateOverallOK unit test

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
